reportId.description: Unique identifier for the test specification.

runId.description: Identifier for the run that produced this report, derived from the run's start timestamp. Matches the run's artifact folder name (`run-<runId>`). System-populated.

runDir.description: Absolute path to the run's artifact folder (`<output>/.doc-detective/run-<runId>/`), where the `runFolder` reporter archives results and `autoScreenshot` images are saved. Step-level `autoScreenshot` paths in the report are relative to this folder. System-populated.
